title: The match Expression (PHP 8)
description: A modern, strict alternative to switch.

slides.title: match: The New Kid
slides.content:
# match Expression (PHP 8+)

`match` is similar to `switch` but stricter and returns a value.

```php
$result = match ($variable) {
    value1 => expression1,
    value2 => expression2,
    default => defaultExpression,
};
```

Key differences:
*   No `break` needed.
*   Strict comparison (`===`) by default.
*   Returns a value.
*   Throws an error if no default and no match.

slides.title: match Example
Strict Comparison

quizData.question: What happens if no case matches in a match expression without a default?
quizData.explanation: match throws an UnhandledMatchError if no case matches and no default is provided.
